---
title: "Density Based Clustering Benchmark Plus Simulation"
subtitle: "\\Cluster Analysis Final Report"
author: |
  | Josh Heytler, SJSU MS Statistics
  | Callie (Khoa) Nguyen, SJSU MS Statistics
  | Nathan Samarasena, SJSU MS Statistics
  | Dr. Cristina Tortora, Professor of Statistics SJSU
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
# bibliography: references.bib
# csl: ieee.csl
output: 
  pdf_document:
    extra_dependencies: ["float"]
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: true
fig_caption: true
classoption: titlepage
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{fancyhdr}
  - \usepackage{hyperref}
  - \pagestyle{fancy}
  - \fancyhead{}
  - \fancyfoot{}
  - \fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
  - \fancyfoot[R]{\footnotesize\hyperlink{toc}{Table of Contents}}
  - \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
  - \renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0.4pt}
  - \usepackage{amsmath}
  - \usepackage{bm}
  - \usepackage{tabularx}
  - \usepackage[table]{xcolor}
  - \usepackage{array}
  - \renewcommand{\tabularxcolumn}[1]{m{#1}} 
  - \newcolumntype{Y}{>{\centering\arraybackslash}X}
  - \setcounter{secnumdepth}{5}
  - \usepackage{caption}
  - \captionsetup{
      font=small,
      labelfont=bf,
      labelsep=colon,
      justification=centering
    }
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# r packages used in project

# --- Global Settings ---
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, # Hide all code
                      message = FALSE, # r code messages will not print in the pdf
                      warning = FALSE, # warnings will not print in the pdf
                      fig.width = 5.5, # All figures default to 5 inches wide
                      fig.height = 3, # All figures default to 3 inches high
                      fig.align = 'center', # Add this to center all figures
                      dpi = 300)
# can override figure options in individual chunks
```
